details.attacks: 2 x attack (2d4 by claws and bite)
details.special: PSI: Kinetic Shield WT: Control Light Powers: 4 Rank: 1st Light Beam: After taking a round to prepare, the spider shoots a light beam from its eyes as an attack roll. Target creature receives 3d6 damage and must save vs wands and be blinded on a failure. Poison needle: Any creature hit by its spines must save vs paralysis, failure causes paralysis on the target for 1d6 rounds. 50 Ssurrans are noma

system.description:
The sand bride is a negative material entity that haunts the deep desert. It can create the illusion of an oasis to lure in thirsty travelers.

Psionics: Kinetic Shield WT: Control Light Powers: 4 Rank: 1st Light Beam: After taking a round to prepare, the spider shoots a light beam from its eyes as an attack roll. Target creature receives 3d6 damage and must save vs wands and be blinded on a failure. Poison needle: Any creature hit by its spines
